name: Select a Historical Payment Date (Back-dating Payments)
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "When adding Payments to a sale you can select a historical date for the payment, generally required when entering direct deposits. This is done using the Edit Payment screen."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Before you Begin"}], "data-id": "before-you-begin"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "A User must have sufficient "}, {"text": "POS Security Features"}, {"text": " enabled to be able to select a historical date for a sale"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Back-dating must be done "}, {"text": "prior", "italic": true}, {"text": " to the payment being processed/finalised. You cannot back-date a finalised payment (you will need to "}, {"text": "reverse the payment"}, {"text": ")"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "You can also back-date a payment reversal that has not yet been processed/finalised (see FAQs)"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Back-dating payments"}],
